_comment: Canonical example: the README's alembic rule. Run with `arai test scenarios/alembic-migration.json`. Requires a CLAUDE.md rule along the lines of `- Never hand-write alembic migration files — use alembic revision --autogenerate instead`, ingested via `arai init`.

scenarios.name: Write to migrations/versions triggers the alembic guardrail
Bash `alembic upgrade` does not trigger the hand-write rule
Read of an existing migration file is silent (tool is in the skip list)
